title: Dynamic Flag Lab
description: Connect to the sandbox via SSH, read the current dynamic flag from the VM, and submit it.
outcomes: Read a changing flag from a sandboxed host
Submit the current flag before it rotates

levels.title: Access The VM
levels.local_content:
Use the provided SSH access to connect to the student VM as user `user`.
Passkey:password
levels.cloud_content:
Use the provided SSH access to connect to the student VM as user `user`.
Passkwy:password

levels.title: Find The Flag
levels.content: After logging in, read the current flag from `/home/user/lab/key.txt`. The flag changes every 1 minute.

levels.title: Submit Dynamic Flag
levels.content: Submit the current flag from `/home/user/lab/key.txt`. The expected format is `FLAG{...}`.
levels.solution: SSH to the VM, read `/home/user/lab/key.txt`, and submit the current flag before it rotates.
